race.comment: ELECTRIC ELVIS (1) looks very well placed third up. Two runs back have been good, close up fresh at Seymour before an even effort at Ballarat Synthetic. Back to turf here suits and he should cross up to take catching. I SAID SO (4) resumes having won his maiden at this track and distance nicely before a break. Profiles nicely for this and can pick up where he left off. RUSSIAN FRONT (3) returned from a spell when he was beaten 7 lengths into seventh over 1208m at Moe. Typically improves second up and has the peaks to challenge, respecting. I'M DYNAMITE (8) dug deep to score two runs back then was beaten 2.75 lengths into second over 1200m at this track last time out. He doesn't win out of turn but should be thereabouts.
